trans-unit.source: Warning: HTML report file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.
trans-unit.target: Warning: HTML report file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.

trans-unit.source: '--report-html-filename' file name argument must end with '.html' (e.g. --report-html-filename myreport.html)
trans-unit.target: '--report-html-filename' file name argument must end with '.html' (e.g. --report-html-filename myreport.html)

trans-unit.source: The name of the generated HTML report
trans-unit.target: The name of the generated HTML report

trans-unit.source: file name argument must not contain a path or invalid characters (e.g. --report-html-filename myreport.html)
trans-unit.target: file name argument must not contain a path or invalid characters (e.g. --report-html-filename myreport.html)

trans-unit.source: Produce a self-contained HTML report for the current test session
trans-unit.target: Produce a self-contained HTML report for the current test session

trans-unit.source: HTML report generator only works with builders of type 'Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.TestApplicationBuilder'
trans-unit.target: HTML report generator only works with builders of type 'Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.TestApplicationBuilder'
